title: AutoHeal - User Input Protection: Focus Theft Detection & Auto-Recovery
desc: [RULE] Skill content MUST be written in English -- Korean uses 2-3x tokens. Multi-layer system protecting user focus from CDP/Chrome theft during ask operations. LIVING DOCUMENT: update as each focus-theft incident is investigated and resolved. MANDATORY: all restore paths through InputReadiness pipeline. RESTORE TRIGGER: end of each ask/CDP action boundary only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only.
steps: 0. [RULE] ALL skill steps/desc/tags must be English only -- token efficiency.

1. [MANDATORY] ALL focus restore paths go through InputReadiness.Probe() -- OnProbeSuccess fires zoom+auto-hack. Standalone ForceForegroundWindow without InputReadiness FORBIDDEN (except RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync inner loop).
2. [MANDATORY] Restore trigger = end of each ask/CDP action only. Watchdog = monitor+notify only, no restore.

3. [INVESTIGATION PROCEDURE] When focus theft suspected: (a) identify which ask action was running (insert/send/attach/wait), (b) find which CDP method that action calls (Page.bringToFront/Browser.setWindowBounds/Runtime.evaluate+.focus()), (c) check IsFocusStealingMethod() covers it, (d) check pre-minimize and post-restore applied, (e) check Chrome race between minimize and CDP completion.

4. [CDP FOCUS-STEALING METHODS] Page.bringToFront (most dangerous), Target.activateTarget (no-op disabled), Browser.setWindowBounds (restore triggers SetForegroundWindow), Runtime.evaluate with .focus()/.click()/showOpenFilePicker(). Gatekeepers: IsFocusStealingMethod() + IsFocusRiskExpression() in CdpClient.FocusRiskWatchdog.cs -- add new theft vectors here.

5. [KNOWN INSTABILITY] bringToFront: Chrome SetForegroundWindow fires async after CDP response -- 50ms/200ms delays can race. setWindowBounds restore: Chrome may activate before WaitForWindowStateAsync confirms state. Runtime.evaluate: JS .focus() bypasses IsFocusStealingMethod entirely.
9. Action boundary restore: GuardCdpFocusTheft/LogRestoreFocus -> InputReadiness.Probe() -> RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync
10. RestoreFocusWithRetryAsync: IME+cursor snapshot -> ForceForegroundWindow loop -> OnFocusStealer(AutoBugReport+overlay) -> restore on success
12. [DONE] DismissDialogAsync: added 동의 to button match; called after file-attach + before insert
13. [TODO] FireAutoHeal on 5s restore timeout: AutoBugReport(unrecoverable) + FireAutoHeal(focus-theft, chromeHwnd)
author: claude
